metadata.description: Integration Service API Workflow representing the UiPath Healthcare Agentic Solution 'Claim Denial Prevention & Resolution'. Detects denial root causes and orchestrates corrective actions to protect claim revenue during the crisis. Consumed by the Stakeholder-Parent Impact Assessment stage. DEPLOY-TIME NOTE: Data Fabric refs (qem:Provider[slug=...]) resolve at deploy via 'uip api-workflow registry stub' against a live tenant. Here the outputs are shaped deterministically from workflow inputs by a JavaScript/Assign activity; the live Data Fabric read and connector calls are NOT hand-authored.

script.code: var day = $workflow.input.simulated_day; var atRisk = 4200 + day * 60; var revenue = Math.round((atRisk * 1875.5) * 100) / 100; return { denial_root_causes: ['CARC-16 missing or invalid information on submitted claim', 'CARC-197 precertification/authorization absent on payer-side adjudication', 'CARC-29 timely filing limit exceeded during claim-flow outage', 'BAA-scoped eligibility data unavailable from ClearFlow Pricing Engine'], at_risk_claim_count: atRisk, recommended_actions: ['Re-run ClearFlow Pricing Engine eligibility batch for affected provider cohort', 'Open Payment Continuity escalation for stakeholder ' + $workflow.input.stakeholder_id, 'Submit corrected-claim resubmission queue to Apex Health Plan and SummitBlue within timely-filing window', 'Attach denial root-cause summary to Impact Assessment stage of master case ' + $workflow.input.master_case_id], revenue_at_risk_usd: revenue };
